name: revpi-dio-grafana
summary: Read RevPi DIO counter values, switch outputs, and visualize state, counts, and rates with a local UI and Grafana.
industrialUseCase: Local machine pulse counting, event-rate monitoring, output checks, and digital input diagnostics on Revolution Pi devices.

components.name: RevPiModIO
components.role: Python access to the RevPi process image for input, counter, and output control

components.name: InfluxDB Python Client
components.role: Writes DIO samples and schema markers to InfluxDB
